FF14COMBO-FAST_BLADE_CARD.title: Fast Blade
FF14COMBO-FAST_BLADE_CARD.description: Deal !D! damage. Gain 2 Vigor. Gain 1 Combo.
FF14COMBO-FIGHT_OR_FIGHT_CARD.title: Fight-or-flight Response
FF14COMBO-JUST_BEAT_IT_CARD.title: Just Beat It
FF14COMBO-JUST_BEAT_IT_CARD.description: Can only be played if you have at least 3 Combo. Convert 3 Combo into 6 Vigor.

FF14COMBO-RAGE_OF_HALONE_CARD.descriptio: Deal !D! damage. Gain 1 Combo. Gain 4 Vigor.
FF14COMBO-RIOT_BLADE_CARD.title: Riot Blade
FF14COMBO-RIOT_BLADE_CARD.description: Deal !D! damage. Gain 2 Vigor. Gain 1 Combo.
